WINDIGO Documentation
=====================

Welcome to WINDIGO's documentation! This is currently a work-in-progress, so check back later for new
additions. If you have any suggestions for additions or modifications to this page, just let us know
using the contact information at the bottom of the WINDIGO GitHub repository's README file.

   :maxdepth: 2
